qualifications.label: Qualifications
qualifications.help: Add each course or certificate separately.

options.agreeDoulaServices: Do you agree to actively provide Doula Services?
options.agreeInterview: Do you agree to an interview by one or more committee members?
options.commitProfessionalDev: Do you agree to submit proof of up to 10 hours of professional development each year?
options.willInsurance: Will you take out professional indemnity insurance? (recommended)
options.listDirectory: Do you wish to be listed as a practicing End of Life Doula in our directory?
options.provideCriminalCheck: Are you willing to provide a current Ministry of Justice criminal record check?
options.attendMeetings: Are you willing to attend regular Re:Member meetings and events, and engage with and support your local Re:Member community?
options.workRemotely: Are you willing to work remotely where there is no other available Professional Member in a Client's area?

coreCompetencies.label: Core competencies
coreCompetencies.help: Tick the competencies you are confident in providing. Stable column order — reordering breaks the production sheet contract.

options.bodyCareAfterDeath: Body care and After Death care

accuracy.label: I confirm that the information I have provided is true and accurate to the best of my knowledge.

ethics.label: I agree to abide by the Re:Member Code of Ethics and Scope of Practice.

scope.label: I understand and will work within the Re:Member Scope of Practice.

doulaServices.label: I agree to actively provide Doula Services.

interview.label: I agree to an interview by one or more committee members.

professionalDev.label: I agree to submit proof of up to 10 hours of professional development each year.

criminalCheck.label: I am willing to provide a current Ministry of Justice criminal record check.

meetings.label: I am willing to attend regular Re:Member meetings and events, and engage with and support my local Re:Member community.
